# Fixture: p6a_work_experience_blocked
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 7.6s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Linda! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: Help
Concierge: To start your orientation, open the Shiftsmart app and tap Get started.
Partner: I am trying to enter work experience in the setup and it won't let me enter anything

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
That sounds like a bug with the work experience screen. Quit the app fully and reopen it — that usually fixes it. Give it another try after reopening.
